advisory_rubric_items.description: The submitted patch satisfies the central maintainer request, not just the narrow visible test command.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff fully resolves this task for godhand: Fix: stabilize auth csrf flow and production asset loading

advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation handles edge cases naturally implied by the task and affected code paths.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff handles realistic edge cases around frontend/src/components/ProfileQuickMenu.tsx, frontend/src/lib/authApi.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/GameScreen.tsx, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/buildingSprites.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/oreSprites.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/terrainTileset.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/valleyDecorations.ts, frontend/src/pages/lobby/LobbyScreen.tsx, server/api/routers/auth.py, server/docs/auth.md while preserving the requested behavior.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The change preserves or improves existing error handling instead of masking failures.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff keeps failure modes explicit and maintainable for the task behavior in godhand.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Existing public behavior and compatibility constraints remain intact outside the requested fix.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff avoids breaking existing documented behavior, public APIs, file formats, or command-line contracts.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Visible regression tests exercise the requested behavior rather than only checking superficial execution.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the submitted tests make make test-backend-auth meaningfully validate the requested behavior.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The fix covers behavior in the same functional area as the extracted reference tests.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff addresses the behavior covered by these inferred test areas: server/tests/test_auth_user_flow.py.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Tests cover at least one successful or expected-use path for the new behavior.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the patch includes or preserves clear positive-path coverage for the requested behavior.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Tests cover a failing, boundary, malformed, or regression-prone case when such a case is relevant.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the patch includes useful negative or boundary coverage for the task, without overfitting to implementation details.

advisory_rubric_items.description: New or edited tests are integrated into the repository's normal test workflow.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether tests are wired into the existing project workflow so make test-backend-auth or the documented test command runs them.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch is focused and avoids unrelated rewrites, broad churn, or cosmetic-only edits.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff is appropriately scoped for the task and avoids unrelated churn outside frontend/src/components/ProfileQuickMenu.tsx, frontend/src/lib/authApi.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/GameScreen.tsx, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/buildingSprites.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/oreSprites.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/terrainTileset.ts, frontend/src/pages/game/theme/valleyDecorations.ts, frontend/src/pages/lobby/LobbyScreen.tsx, server/api/routers/auth.py, server/docs/auth.md.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch does not change unrelated public APIs, configuration defaults, or generated outputs.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff avoids unrelated public API, configuration, dependency, generated-file, or packaging changes.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation follows the repository's existing design style and naming conventions.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the implementation is idiomatic for godhand, matching nearby abstractions, names, and project style.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation is simple to reason about and avoids unnecessary abstraction or brittle special cases.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the implementation is understandable, localized, and avoids brittle special casing.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch avoids unnecessary new dependencies and remains compatible with the generated task environment.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff fits the existing dependency set and can run in the task environment without extra unstated setup.

advisory_rubric_items.description: User-visible outputs, diagnostics, return values, or persisted data match the requested contract.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether observable outputs and side effects match the requested task behavior for godhand.
